item.description: Betfair Racing reposteó Sam Turner @STurnerTipster · 5h Young Jack going places Cita Betfair Racing @BetfairRacing · 11h After a couple of winners yesterday, @STurnerTipster is targeting two more at Ayr 1 3 1 mil

item.title: JohnDugganSport: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 1h Coventry City broke my little heart in 1987, but they are the home of 2-Tone. So they’
item.description: John Duggan @JohnDugganSport · 1h Coventry City broke my little heart in 1987, but they are the home of 2-Tone. So they’re alright. Kudos to Frank Lampard. Rolled up his sleeves and got on with it. 1 10 1 mil

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 1h Can KIM ROQUE land the Scottish Grand National?
@sportingsamcan certainly thinks so...

item.description: Racing TV @RacingTV · 1h Do not miss the @coral Scottish Grand National live on Racing TV on Saturday @ayrracecourse 2 3 3 mil

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 2h "It’s a real honour to pick up this ride!"
@OsborneSaffie can't wait to partner Touleen
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 2h "It’s a real honour to pick up this ride!"
@OsborneSaffie can't wait to partner Touleen at @NewburyRacing tomorrow... De attheraces.com 14 3 mil
